author: krisoshea.eth
content: Hey <@686695036733227017> just wanted to say thanks a mill for your really helpful and detailed review comments. Marko also added some additional things that we want to change too. We’ll incorporate all of that feedback and get back to you when it’s in a good final shape for another review. Thanks very much, much appreciated!

author: krisoshea.eth
content:
Hi <@686695036733227017> I've now merged Marco's changes and I've also applied changes based off of your feedback comments and responded to them all. Thank you very much for all the feedback, it's much appreciated.

I think the doc is looking very polished now that I've addressed that feedback. I think this should be ready for one last review if you have time. If not, that's totally fine, we should be good to merge then.

If there is further feedback, I'll be keeping an eye on the thread over the weekend and I'll work on it to make sure that it's ready to go by next Monday. Marco and I are working on the proposal presentation in parallel. Thanks again!
